column2: View Inactive/Deleted Phased Trial Build-up Details
column3: ['Log in as CAA program manager. ', 'Navigate to the details page of an inactive/deleted PTB. ', 'Verify that no relevant information is displayed about the inactive/deleted PTB. ', "Check if a message indicating the PTB's status (inactive or deleted) is displayed. "]
column4: ['Successfully logged in. ', 'Able to access the details page. ', 'No relevant information is visible on the details page. ', 'A message indicating that the phased trial build-up is either inactive or has been deleted is shown. ']
